claim: The DEU production posterior summary passed readiness and robustness gates and may be discussed with caveats.
required_caveat: Internal staged posterior summary, not a final publication claim.

claim: The native/baseline sampler and readiness gate passed with matched full-objective likelihood scope.
required_caveat: Native readiness supports descriptive comparison only.

claim: DEU and native posteriors can be compared descriptively for shared parameters omega_b, n_s, and A_planck.
required_caveat: Descriptive posterior comparison is not model evidence.

claim: DEU-only beta and p_vis posterior summaries have no native analogue.
required_caveat: Do not treat absence in native as evidence by itself.

claim: TT_lite remained diagnostic-only and excluded from sampled production likelihoods.
required_caveat: Do not claim TT_lite was part of either sampled posterior.

claim: The tri-anchor ledger remains retained as objective-split context.
required_caveat: Tri-anchor context is monitoring context, not a posterior component.

claim: DEU is superior to native ΛCDM/native baseline.
reason: No explicit evidence/Bayes-factor or matched model-selection stage has passed.

claim: The fixed-reference native-vs-DEU likelihood delta is model evidence.
reason: It is a reference/preflight diagnostic delta only.

claim: TT_lite is included in the sampled production posterior.
reason: TT_lite is explicitly diagnostic-only and excluded.

claim: This is ready as a final publication-style claim.
reason: Final external claims remain gated pending final scoped report/evidence framing.

claim: The DEU-only parameters prove new physics.
reason: The current artifacts support only a caveated internal posterior summary and descriptive comparison.
